name: cxpp
description: Consent-first bootstrap, refresh, and status skills for Codex Power Pack host configuration.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap and inspect CxPP host wiring.
interface.longDescription: CxPP provides consent-first skills for configuring host-managed MCP pointers, optional bootstrap components, and CxPP installation health without managing external services.
defaultPrompt: Set up Codex Power Pack host wiring with /cxpp:init.
